original_image_tags: Hand-drawn sketch of a circle with short lines radiating outward from its perimeter, resembling a sun. A horizontal line is drawn across the center of the circle. Inside the circle, above the line, is handwritten text "30\"".

elements.description: A hand-drawn sketch of a single round light or object, depicted as a circle with radiating lines around its perimeter. The text '30"' is written inside the circle. It is labeled as 'Object' in the surrounding typed text.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on the core visual content—a hand-drawn sketch of a circle with radiating lines containing the text '30"'—but B adds a claim about a surrounding typed label ('Object') that A omits without contradiction.
